parameters.query:
WITH q AS (SELECT NULLIF(trim($1),'') AS term)
SELECT json_build_object(
  'term', (SELECT term FROM q),
  'projects', CASE WHEN (SELECT term FROM q) IS NULL THEN '[]'::json
    ELSE (SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST) FROM (
      SELECT id, name, current_phase, project_type, location_city, status, updated_at
        FROM projects
       WHERE name ILIKE '%' || (SELECT term FROM q) || '%'
          OR location_city ILIKE '%' || (SELECT term FROM q) || '%'
          OR location_address ILIKE '%' || (SELECT term FROM q) || '%'
       LIMIT 20
    ) t)
  END,
  'clients', CASE WHEN (SELECT term FROM q) IS NULL THEN '[]'::json
    ELSE (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (
      SELECT id, name, pii_decrypt(email_enc) AS email, created_at
        FROM clients
       WHERE name ILIKE '%' || (SELECT term FROM q) || '%'
          OR pii_decrypt(email_enc) ILIKE '%' || (SELECT term FROM q) || '%'
       LIMIT 20
    ) t)
  END,
  'recent_events', CASE WHEN (SELECT term FROM q) IS NULL THEN '[]'::json
    ELSE (SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.occurred_at DESC) FROM (
      SELECT event_type, severity, source_ip, occurred_at, LEFT(description, 80) AS preview
        FROM security_events
       WHERE description ILIKE '%' || (SELECT term FROM q) || '%'
          OR source_ip = (SELECT term FROM q)
       ORDER BY occurred_at DESC
       LIMIT 10
    ) t)
  END
) AS report;
